arts.ttl: Preview: Middlesbrough vs. Derby County - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Middlesbrough and Derby County, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: David Ozoh breaks silence after fresh Derby County injury blow
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. David Ozoh has responded to being ruled out for the rest of the season with a message to Derby County supporters on social media.

arts.ttl: What Michael Carrick thinks of Derby County ahead of Middlesbrough clash
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. With John Eustace now in charge, Derby fans will hope he can pull off a hat-trick after he guided Blackburn to two wins over Boro already this season.

arts.ttl: Derby County set for transfer search after David Ozoh injury blow
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Asked whether he could still bring in a free agent after Ozoh's injury, Eustace said: "We are looking at a few players to come in and train, but there is nobody else signed at the moment."

arts.ttl: EFL confirm Championship play-off dates as Leeds United set sights on title glory
arts.sum: Dates have been confirmed for this season's Championship play-offs as Leeds United look to avoid the end-of-season extravaganza. Get Leeds United news to your phone with our WhatsApp community

arts.ttl: George Edmundson and Rav van den Berg Middlesbrough injury updates ahead of Derby County
arts.sum: Middlesbrough are awaiting news on if either George Edmundson or Rav van den Berg will be available for Saturday’s clash with Derby County, with head coach Michael Carrick not ruling either out altogether. While the club wait to see if either of the players’ issues settle down in time for Saturday, Luke Ayling will be readying himself to step in if needed, having earned the praise of Carrick after Stoke for coming on at centre-back after Edmundson’s injury.

arts.ttl: Derby County suffer big David Ozoh blow after John Eustace update
arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. Speaking ahead of the clash against Middlesbrough this weekend, Eustace said: "Unfortunately, David will be missing for the rest of the season which is a big blow to the group.
